llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Customer Service Officer for Nutrition and Health (Contractor)
job.description: Contract Period : 1 Aug 2026 - 31 Dec 2027 * Position summary: -A Customer Service Officer (CSO) plays a critical operational role in ensuring both customer experience and supply reliability by maintaining accuracy and efficiency across the entire Order-to-Delivery process. -Through close collaboration with overseas manufacturing sites and internal stakeholders, the CSO minimizes supply risks and systematically manages customer order processing, invoicing, and returns. -This role requires strong SAP-based operational capabilities and a high level of data accuracy, along with the ability to continuously improve ways of working in an AI and digital automation environment. The position also demands effective problem-solving skills in complex situations involving multiple stakeholders. *Qualifications required: -Demonstrate SAP knowledge especially on MM and VA module -Strong problem-solving skills in situations involving multiple stakeholders -Ability to work flexibly across time zones -High attention to details, and quickly adapt to change in AI automation -Business communication in English language for liaising with global interfaces *Key Responsibility: -Coordinate with oversea factories to ensure timely availability of manufactured goods -Review and process customer orders accurately -Proactive customer communications related to Order Management -Follow up order block/release and payment -Send and amend tax invoice -Handle product returns and replacements -1–3 years of working experience with fluency in English.
